name: Hacker News
description: Hacker News API - top, new, best stories, Ask HN, Show HN, jobs, item details, user profiles, and full-text search via Algolia

tools.name: top_stories
tools.description: Get the IDs of the current top stories on Hacker News (up to 500). Returns an array of item IDs sorted by ranking. Use hackernews-get-item to fetch details for each ID.

tools.name: new_stories
tools.description: Get the IDs of the newest stories on Hacker News (up to 500). Returns an array of item IDs sorted by submission time (newest first).

tools.name: best_stories
tools.description: Get the IDs of the best stories on Hacker News (up to 500). Returns an array of item IDs sorted by best ranking algorithm.

tools.name: ask_stories
tools.description: Get the IDs of the latest Ask HN stories (up to 200).

tools.name: show_stories
tools.description: Get the IDs of the latest Show HN stories (up to 200).

tools.name: job_stories
tools.description: Get the IDs of the latest job postings on Hacker News (up to 200).

tools.name: get_item
tools.description: Get a specific Hacker News item by ID. Items can be stories, comments, jobs, Ask HNs, or polls. Returns title, url, score, by (author), time, descendants (comment count), kids (child comment IDs), text, and type.

tools.name: get_user
tools.description: Get a Hacker News user profile by username. Returns id, created (unix timestamp), karma, about (bio in HTML), and submitted (array of item IDs the user has posted).

tools.name: max_item
tools.description: Get the current largest item ID. Useful for polling — you can walk backward from this to discover new items.

tools.name: updates
tools.description: Get recently changed item IDs and user profiles. Returns { items: [...], profiles: [...] }. Useful for real-time tracking of updates.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Full-text search across Hacker News stories and comments via the Algolia API. Returns matching items with title, url, author, points, num_comments, and created_at. Sorted by relevance by default.

tags.description: Filter by type: story, comment, ask_hn, show_hn, front_page, poll. Combine with AND using comma, OR using parentheses: (story,poll),show_hn

numericFilters.description: Filter by numeric fields: created_at_i, points, num_comments. Examples: 'points>100', 'created_at_i>1609459200,points>50'

tools.name: search_by_date
tools.description: Search Hacker News stories and comments sorted by date (newest first) via the Algolia API. Same parameters as search but returns results in reverse chronological order.

tags.description: Filter by type: story, comment, ask_hn, show_hn, front_page, poll

numericFilters.description: Filter by numeric fields: created_at_i, points, num_comments. Examples: 'points>100', 'created_at_i>1609459200,points>50'
